raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX made XX/XX/year> in the amount of {$1100.00}. 

The package arrived opened XXXX  retaped, with the contents replaced. The merchant refused XXXX  honor a replacement XXXX  asked me XXXX  open a dispute with my credit card. I have provided proof, including emails XXXX  call logs with the merchant, photos of the outside XXXX  inside of the package, XXXX a confirmation of receipt of tampered package by my building 's concierge signed by the building 's management office. 

There is no other proof XXXX  provide, XXXX  it is mind boggling XXXX  me that my credit card company is holding me liable for a stolen package, especially when the merchant asked XXXX  open the credit card dispute. 

I have been a XXXX loyalty member for many years ( including XXXX levels XXXX and XXXX the past XXXX  years ), have XXXX points, XXXX  travel constantly for work XXXX  pleasure on XXXX XXXX This is, frankly, unacceptable, XXXX  I should not be held liable for what is provably a tampered package with stolen contents.
